raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/2023 I did a purchase of {$1400.00} of a tourist service. The service was cancelled and I opened a dispute, Citi Bank gave me a conditional credit of - {$1400.00}. 

For my XXXX statement they reversed the credit with a charge of {$1400.00}. The merchant issued a refund of - {$1400.00} on XXXX XXXX, because they were supposed to refund only 95 % of the total which I agreed. 

However on XXXX XXXX I received another charge of the same merchant of {$1400.00} which will net the balance of the refund, leaving me with {$1400.00} of debt. 

I complaint again about this transaction and on XX/XX/2023 they told me they were incorrect and that they will opened a new dispute regarding that {$1400.00} charge, but they never did. I called them multiple times, but they are not able to reopen my case or open a new one. 

I contacted the merchant and they sent me the detail of the charges made on my account, and that they never did that other charge of {$1400.00}, told the bank multiple times I had that proof but they told me not to send it before having a case number assigned, but they haven't assigned yet.
